items.title: Man United v Leeds United ticket and hospitality packages at Dublin’s Croke Park from just £172 for pre-season clash
items.summary: MAN United fans have the chance to catch their heroes in pre-season action against fierce rivals Leeds. items.title: Thomas Tuchel and squad to ‘take care’ of heartbroken Eberechi Eze after Champions League final penalty miss
items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL and his England squad are planning to “take care” of Eberechi Eze after his Champions League heartbreak. items.summary: Christmas Day provided Aidan O'Brien with his 12th victory in the Betfred Derby at Epsom.

items.title: Rain frustrates England's march to victory over New Zealand
items.summary: England edged closer to victory over New Zealand in the first Test despite a day of frustration brought on by persistent rain.

items.title: Williams finds out Queen's opponents for return to professional tennis
items.summary: Serena Williams and partner Victoria Mboko will face Nicole Melichar-Martinez and Erin Routliffe in the first round at the HSBC Championships at Queen's next week in the 23-time Grand Slam winner's tennis return.

items.title: Jurgen Klopp has ‘no ambition’ to take over at Real Madrid with Liverpool hero only having eyes for dream job
items.summary: JURGEN KLOPP only has eyes on the Germany job — and has “no ambition” to take over Real Madrid. The Spanish club’s current president Florentino Perez, favourite to get the nod for another term, will bring in Jose Mourinho for a second spell as manager if he wins. items.title: How to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
items.summary: The BBC will broadcast Scotland's first World Cup match since 1998, when they take on Haiti on 14 June, plus their final group match against Brazil and England's group match against Ghana.

items.title: Kylian Mbappe refuses to watch World Cup game back over fears it might ‘awake some demons’
items.summary: KYLIAN MBAPPE revealed he has never rewatched the thrilling 2022 World Cup final because it "might awaken some demons."
